filesystem.//: Scoped to matters and templates directories only. Client data never leaves the local machine. No access to home directory, downloads, or other sensitive paths.

postgres.//: Local matter management database. Tracks deadlines, parties, status, and billing codes. Read/write access for matter CRUD operations.

web-search.//: Case law and statute research. All search queries are logged to audit trail. Results should always be verified against primary sources — never cite directly from search results.
